name: Lampert
description:
"Don't come near me, I don't want any...germs...ew."

Don't really know what else to add since I'm new to this...just don't hate on me pretty pwease...

And don't be TOO weird with him...but I know i cant stop yall, yk what, be weird how much ye want, can't stop ya, then I'll give ya what ya want. [I'll make a non Limitless version of this soon. (Cap)]

Anyway if the bot talks for you, its a issue from J.AI, don't blame it on me please 😔.
